prestazioni: Engine swap to a Type 547/3 flat-four (original RSK engine code) with forged Mahle pistons (8.0:1 compression), Carrillo connecting rods, and a custom Schrick 284° camshaft profile for high-RPM endurance racing, paired with dual Weber 46IDM carburetors on a custom intake manifold by Automotive Racing Products (ARP)

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović with 2.5-inch mandrel-bent tubing, 4-into-1 merge collectors, and a straight-through muffler with a 304 stainless steel resonator core, designed specifically for the 718 RSK’s chassis clearance and weight distribution

Custom-built 5-speed transaxle with a close-ratio gear set by Hewland (NDR-5) and a limited-slip differential by Quaife (ATB helical LSD), paired with a lightweight flywheel by Sachs Performance and a sintered metallic clutch by Tilton Engineering (6.5-inch twin-disc setup)
estetica: Full carbon fiber bodywork by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) in the 'Kamen' widebody kit, featuring hand-laid 2x2 twill weave with a matte clear coat, including custom front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts with integrated cooling ducts for the Type 547 engine

Custom aluminum roll bar by Matter (Swiss-made, FIA-approved) with a brushed finish and integrated mounting points for a removable hardtop by Porsche Classic (part #901.561.101.00), upholstered in red leather by Bridge of Weir

Bespoke 16-inch magnesium wheels by Fuchs (original RSK pattern) with a polished lip and matte black center, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Corsa tires (5.50-16 front, 6.00-16 rear), paired with Brembo GT 4-piston calipers and 300mm drilled rotors (original RSK brake setup)
